summary: Hand-authored SQLite quote ledger powering watch/log/search (every quote snapshot persisted; watch reports price delta vs last snapshot).
reason: Quotes are POST-generated, not a GET resource, so the generator's sync-based store can't capture them; a dedicated ledger enables fare tracking over time.
validated_outcome: watch records snapshots and reports deltas; log/search return rows; modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go).
